data.name: Sisters in Sin 🔞
data.detailed_description:
Sisters in Sin🔞 是一款成人視覺小說（18+），在這裡，誘惑隱藏在祈禱背後，慾望逐漸打破神聖誓言。



你將扮演「慾望之惡魔」，偽裝成一名迷人的傳教士，潛入一座偏遠修道院，目標只有一個：從內部腐化這片神聖之地。
看似簡單的任務，很快變成一場心理操控與控制的遊戲——因為修女們並不天真。



每位修女都有自己的性格、秘密與禁忌幻想。透過時間管理與選擇，你將引導她們走向被禁止的自我探索。



訪客的捐贈可用於擴建修道院，解鎖新地點、劇情與內容，打造屬於你的「墮落天堂」。

Sisters in Sin🔞 是一段關於權力與腐化的挑釁性敘事體驗。



  • 充滿誘惑與反轉的沉浸式劇情。
  • VN風格呈現與生動角色。
  • 多樣角色與隱藏秘密。
  • 策略玩法與選擇。
  • 操作簡單——可單手遊玩 🤩

data.short_description: Sisters in Sin 是一款成人視覺小說，你將扮演偽裝成傳教士的慾望惡魔。操控日程、發掘隱藏慾望、腐化神聖誓言，並將修道院變成充滿誘惑之地。18+
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS
  • 處理器: Apple M1 або Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

data.name: Sisters in Sin 🔞
data.detailed_description:
Sisters in Sin🔞 is an adult visual novel (18+) where temptation hides behind prayers and desire slowly breaks sacred vows.



You play as the Demon of Lust, disguised as a charming preacher who infiltrates a remote monastery with one simple mission: corrupt the holiest place in the region from the inside.
What starts as an easy task quickly turns into a game of psychology, manipulation, and control — because the nuns are far from innocent.



Each sister has her own personality, secrets, boundaries, and forbidden fantasies. By carefully managing daily schedules, making the right choices, and interacting with visitors, you guide them on a journey from strict devotion to forbidden self-discovery.



Donations from guests allow you to expand and upgrade the monastery, unlock new locations, scenes, outfits, and story paths — shaping your own twisted version of paradise.

Sisters in Sin🔞 is a provocative narrative-driven experience focused on corruption, power, and the fragile line between holiness and sin.



  • An immersive, provocative storyline filled with temptation, manipulation, and narrative twists that constantly blur the line between holiness and sin.
  • VN-style presentation with expressive character art, dynamic camera angles, and outfit choices that reflect each character’s journey.
  • A cast of diverse nuns and visitors, each with unique personalities, secrets, desires, and personal boundaries to uncover.
  • Strategic gameplay that blends schedule management, light exploration, decision-making, and relationship progression.
  • A relaxed, intuitive control scheme — yes, fully playable with one hand 🤩

data.short_description: Sisters in Sin is an adult visual novel where you play as the Demon of Lust disguised as a preacher. Manipulate schedules, uncover hidden desires, corrupt sacred vows, and turn a holy monastery into a place of temptation. 18+
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
